report_name: W5 Complaints - 01 - HBO Max Activation Errors
error_or_reason_filter: wrong email, renew subscription, something went wrong
key_fields: Case Number, Contact Date, Market, Customer Email (masked), Device Type, Error Type, Resolution, Case Owner

report_name: W5 Complaints - 02 - TNT Sports HBO Entertainment Access Confusion
error_or_reason_filter: entertainment access, basic tier, get access locked
key_fields: Case Number, Contact Date, Market, Customer Package/Tier, Scenario Variant, Expected vs Actual Tier, Resolution Path, Case Owner
notes: DTC hybrid billing at hbomax.com exists but path is non-obvious from Sky activation flow

report_name: W5 Complaints - 03 - Region Lock Out of Region Error
key_fields: Case Number, Contact Date, Market, Customer Email (masked), Account Origin Region, VPN/Legacy Flag, Resolution, Case Owner
notes: No self-serve resolution. Requires account-level region reset.

report_name: W5 Complaints - 04 - Discovery Plus Credentials Not Recognised
error_or_reason_filter: email does not exist, discovery+, credentials not recognised
key_fields: Case Number, Contact Date, Market, Provider Billing Source, Login Method Attempted, Error Message, Resolution Path, Case Owner
notes: Sky HBO Max entitlement requires new account via Sky activation portal. D+ creds do not transfer.

report_name: W5 Complaints - 05 - Double Accounts Consolidation Queries
error_or_reason_filter: merge, consolidation, double account, duplicate account
key_fields: Case Number, Contact Date, Market, Account 1 Provider, Account 2 Provider, Consolidation Requested, Resolution Status, Case Owner
notes: No self-serve consolidation path exists. Typically EE/BT + Sky account pairs.
